title: AIF is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: AIF is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
AIF invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AIF:
AIF is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
